use_cases: Right-click context menus in desktop applications
Action menus for selected items in list views
Keyboard-navigable option menus with hover states
ai_summary: A context menu component with hover states, active states, and keyboard navigation support. Features a Row subcomponent with icon slot, children text, and right slot for additional actions. Includes dark mode support via Tailwind dark: classes and uses Subframe's icon system. Designed as a reusable overlay pattern for SaaS and dev tool interfaces.
